details: Begin exploring examples/master.md catalog for Flash Attention relevant perf patterns

Read full master.md (16 entries). Mapping entries to Flash Attention knobs: compute_block_size, double_buffer, matmul_output_subblock, compute_fusion, reduce_block/reduce_accumulate/row_reduce_accumulate, reader_placement
Verified README/code paths for all relevant entries. Producing final report mapped to 5 Flash Attention knobs.
Beginning SDPA compute kernel exploration for Flash-Attention algorithm structure

Read sdpa_compute.cpp, sdpa.h (compute_sdpa_chunk online-softmax recurrence), reader/writer, FlashAttention.md tech report. Now reading matmul helper headers for QKt transpose flag and PV block shape.

Read both matmul helper headers (sdpa_custom_mm.h QKt-transpose-flag, sdpa_custom_mm_reuse_dest_srcb.h PV) and flash_mla.hpp for recip/normalize + tail reduction. Have full algorithm structure: transpose via matmul flag, online-softmax recurrence, reduce dims, exp+scale, PV block, normalize, first-chunk init.

Located reconfig-ablation perf lever in examples/master.md compute_block_size entry; read README, report_reconfig_ablation.md, and program_descriptor_with_inline_kernels.py. Mechanism: reconfig_on CT arg flips tilize/untilize helpers to NoReconfigure, add to BinaryDataFormatReconfig::None + PackTileReconfig::None, matmul to DataFormatReconfig::NONE. Up to 1.19x, compounds to 1.72x on WH_B0.
